/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/mini_sql.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mini_sql.dir/src/tokenizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mini_sql.dir/src/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mini_sql.dir/src/csv_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mini_sql.dir/src/executor.cpp.o -o mini_sql
